note: minimal well-formed catalog search response (empty products[]) with capability schema URL
product missing required title/description/price_range/variants -> must be rejected
valid checkout response: required top-level fields + totals with exactly one subtotal and one total (correct signs)

valid error response: ucp status=error + non-empty messages[] with a well-formed error message. capabilities.schema points at error_response.json (a non-container leaf schema) so op/direction resolution returns it as-is
error message severity 'catastrophic' outside the recoverable|requires_buyer_input|requires_buyer_review|unrecoverable enum -> must be rejected

checkout read response declaring the discount EXTENSION (extends dev.ucp.shopping.checkout) with a discounts.applied entry (title/amount/method/priority/allocations) + negative items_discount totals; oracle composes discount $defs onto checkout
checkout read response declaring the buyer_consent EXTENSION (extends dev.ucp.shopping.checkout) with buyer.consent boolean states; oracle composes buyer-with-consent $defs onto checkout

checkout read response declaring the fulfillment EXTENSION (dev.ucp.shopping.fulfillment extends dev.ucp.shopping.checkout) with one shipping method (id/type/line_item_ids) carrying a destination(id), a group(id/line_item_ids), and an option(id/title/totals); oracle composes the fulfillment field onto checkout
